backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Task, TeamMember, and UserProfile types with CRUD operations, access-control authorization via a mixin, and task sorting by deadline and priority.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (reminders panel repositioning and color contrast fixes) to their affected source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build/planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light (:root) and dark (.dark) themes including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Team Task Manager' that mounts the React app at #root via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router, React Query, and next-themes, with an AuthGuard that renders Login when unauthenticated or the Layout+Outlet when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/AddTaskModal.tsx: Modal dialog for quickly creating a task with mandatory conference, title, optional assignee, and due date fields, using the useCreateTask mutation and predefined member names as fallback.
frontend/src/components/AddTeamMemberMod: Simple modal dialog with a single name input that calls the useAddTeamMember mutation to add a new team member.
frontend/src/components/AddUserModal.tsx: A modal dialog component for adding a new team member by name, using the `useAddTeamMember` mutation hook and displaying success/error toasts.
A modal dialog for creating a new task with fields for conference, title, description, priority, deadline, time range, and assignee, submitting via the `useCreateTask` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EditTaskModal.ts: A modal dialog for editing an existing task, pre-populating all fields from the provided task object and submitting updates via the `useUpdateTask` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/GoogleSignInButt: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/InlineTaskForm.t: A collapsible inline form (visible only to admins) for creating tasks directly on the page without a modal, using the same fields as CreateTaskModal.
frontend/src/components/KanbanBoard.tsx: Renders a three-column Kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Done) by filtering tasks by status and displaying them as `TaskCard` components.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sidebar with navigation links, a user profile section derived from the Internet Identity principal, logout functionality, and a top bar with notification and theme controls.
A modal dialog for managing team members that lists all members with their status and allows removing them via a confirmation alert dialog.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: A bell icon button that shows a dropdown panel with task reminders categorized as overdue, critical, or warning based on deadlines.
frontend/src/components/PersistentTaskFo: A form component for creating new tasks with fields for conference, title, description, priority, deadline, time range, and assignee, submitting to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PriorityBadge.ts: A small display component that renders a colored badge with emoji for High, Medium, or Low task priority values.
frontend/src/components/ReportExportButt: Provides buttons to export task data as CSV for the current week, current month, or a custom date range using a popover date picker.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadgeDropd: A clickable status badge that opens a dropdown to change a task's status (To Do, In Progress, Done) and includes a delete option with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Renders a single task card with priority badge, status, assignees, deadline, and expandable description. Supports inline status editing via a dropdown and opens an EditTaskModal for full edits.
frontend/src/components/TaskFilters.tsx: Provides a search input and assignee dropdown filter UI for the task list. Falls back to a predefined member list if no members are loaded from the backend.
frontend/src/components/TaskStatusContro: Renders a styled select dropdown to update a task's status (To Do, In Progress, Done) using the useUpdateTaskStatus mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/TeamMemberCard.t: Displays a team member's avatar, claimed status, and completed/pending task counts. Admins can expand the card to see up to 5 assigned tasks.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSwitcher.ts: A toggle button that switches between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, with animated Sun/Moon icons and a tooltip.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing admin access control from a URL parameter and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including admin checks, task CRUD operations, task status updates, and team member management using the actor pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskFilters.ts: Custom hook that filters a list of tasks by search string and assignee name using memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskReminders.ts: Custom hook that categorizes tasks into overdue, due within one hour, and due within 24 hours buckets with a total count.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook managing dark/light theme state with localStorage persistence and DOM class/attribute application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for dark and light themes, Tailwind imports, and utility classes for glass effects, gradients, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ActivityLog.tsx: Placeholder page component that displays an empty state for the activity log feature.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing task statistics (total, in-progress, completed, overdue), recent tasks, and upcoming deadlines, with an admin-only create task button.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a branded card with feature highlights and a sign-in button.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding page that collects a user's name on first login and reloads the app to re-trigger the auth flow; described as a placeholder since the backend lacks a profile endpoint.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Main Tasks page supporting Kanban and list view modes with filtering, admin-only task creation, and report export buttons.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMembers.tsx: Team Members management page displaying member stats (total, active, unclaimed) and a grid of member cards with admin-only add functionality.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMemberView.tsx: Personal task dashboard for team members, allowing users to claim their profile and view their assigned tasks with status summaries.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions to export tasks as CSV files filtered by this week, this month, or a custom date range.
frontend/src/utils/reminderLogic.ts: Utility functions to determine if a task is overdue, due soon, or due within 24 hours, and to generate human-readable reminder messages.
frontend/src/utils/taskSorting.ts: Sorts tasks by deadline (ascending) with priority as a tiebreaker, placing tasks without deadlines at the end.
frontend/src/utils/taskUrgency.ts: Computes a task's urgency level (overdue, urgent, soon, normal, completed) and returns corresponding Tailwind color and background classes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Poppins), CSS-variable-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows with glow effects, and animations (fade-in, slide-in, pulse-glow), plus plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a Kanban board app fix request, tracking two known issues (Reminders panel overlap and color contrast problems) as existing features to be resolved, with schema/version metadata and no new feature requests.
